title: lumen — Architecture
ssot_note: JSON=SSOT (AI/tool parse); humans view architecture.html via `python3 serve.py`. Update in-place (not append). History/decisions → CHANGELOG.md. Hierarchy decomposes via `children` (commons single-doc); one fact per node, deeper detail → child nodes.

children.role: Engineer stable light sources for bands nature does not supply — EUV (13.5 nm) first instance, generalizing to any hard-to-generate wavelength lacking a stable natural emitter.
The source problem, not one wavelength: EUV is the first instance, not the boundary.
Input → processing → output (fill as the pipeline takes shape).
